title: Dynamic Current Date Source — Readiness Decision

1_hardcoded_runtime_date_removed.detail: DEFAULT_CURRENT_DATE removed from marketRegimeResult.ts; REPORT_DATE removed from regime route; OpsReportEngine updated

2_date_provider_complete.detail: src/lib/time/currentDate.ts created with getCurrentDateISO() and resolveCurrentDate(). 15/15 tests PASS.

3_api_supports_date_override.detail: Both /api/daily-report/regime and /api/report/ops now accept ?date=YYYY-MM-DD. Falls back to resolveCurrentDate() if omitted.

4_tests_can_use_fixed_date.detail: Service-level tests pass explicit '2026-05-06' arg. API tests use jest.mock('@/lib/time/currentDate') returning '2026-05-06'.

5_timezone_risk.detail: getCurrentDateISO() uses toISOString().slice(0,10) — UTC-based. Risk only on UTC midnight boundaries. Acceptable for daily ops.

6_db_write.detail: No DB write in any changed file.

7_external_api_call.detail: No external API call in any changed file.

8_strategy_behavior_change.detail: No strategy, hypothesis, ROI, win-rate, buy/sell/signal changes.

9_p0_blocker.detail: No blockers remain. All 106+15 tests PASS.

10_next_round.answer: T-05 Walk-Forward Backtest Skeleton (redesigned for portfolio regime context, H001-H012 retired)
10_next_round.detail: T-12b complete. Date risk eliminated. Next highest-leverage task is T-05 walk-forward skeleton for portfolio-level regime-aware backtest.
